recommendations.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
recommendations.overview: An Edinburgh professor and assorted colleagues follow an explorer's trail down an extinct Icelandic volcano to the earth's center.

recommendations.title: The Summit of the Gods
recommendations.overview: A photojournalist's obsessive quest for the truth about the first expedition to Mt. Everest leads him to search for an esteemed climber who went missing.

recommendations.title: The Boy, the Mole, the Fox and the Horse
recommendations.overview: The unlikely friendship of a boy, a mole, a fox and a horse traveling together in the boy's search for home.

recommendations.title: Three from Prostokvashino
recommendations.overview: Little Fedor brings a cat to home despite his mother's distaste for cats. He runs away with his talking cat, to make more friends on the way.

recommendations.title: Spirit: Stallion of the Cimarron
recommendations.overview: A captured mustang remains determined to return to his herd no matter what.

recommendations.title: The Railway Children Return
recommendations.overview: Follow a group of children who are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home.

recommendations.title: It! The Terror from Beyond Space
recommendations.overview: The first manned expedition to Mars is invaded by an unknown life form, which stows away on the rescue ship.

recommendations.title: The Book of Life
recommendations.overview: The journey of Manolo, a young man who is torn between fulfilling the expectations of his family and following his heart. Before choosing which path to follow, he embarks on an incredible adventure that spans fantastical worlds where he must face his

recommendations.title: All Dogs Go to Heaven 2
recommendations.overview: Charlie and Itchy return to Earth to find Gabriel's Horn, but along the way meet up with a young boy named David, who ran away from home.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me Doraemon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Sewashi and Doraemon find themselves way back in time and meet Nobita. It is up to Doraemon to take care of Nobita or else he will not return to the present.
